proposed_hypotheses.text: For each additional year in `age_years`, adjusted mean `pfs_months` is higher.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo
analyses.result_summary: In the adjusted prognostic OLS model, `age_years` had a +0.16871 month coefficient per year (z=469.6, p<1e-300).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `bone_mets=1` have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `bone_mets=0`, after accounting for stage and other baseline factors.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `pleural_effusion=1` have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `pleural_effusion=0`, after accounting for stage and other baseline factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo

proposed_hypotheses.text: For each 1 g/dL increase in `albumin_g_dl`, adjusted mean `pfs_months` is higher.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `ldh_u_l` was -0.00041 months per U/L (p=1.29e-20).

proposed_hypotheses.text: For each 1 percentage-point increase in `weight_loss_pct_6mo`, adjusted mean `pfs_months` is lower.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `weight_loss_pct_6mo` was -0.07294 months per percentage point (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_sotorasib=1` have higher adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `treatment_sotorasib=0` in a main-effects treatment model.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + treatment_pembrolizumab + treatment_sotorasib + treatment_olaparib + treatment_osimertinib
analyses.result_summary: In the treatment main-effects model, `treatment_sotorasib` had an adjusted coefficient of +0.32405 months (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The increase in adjusted mean `pfs_months` associated with `treatment_sotorasib=1` is larger among patients with `kras_g12c=1` than among patients with `kras_g12c=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + treatment_sotorasib + kras_g12c + treatment_sotorasib:kras_g12c
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_sotorasib:kras_g12c` interaction coefficient was +2.53491 months (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `kras_g12c=0`, `treatment_sotorasib=1` is associated with higher adjusted mean `pfs_months` than `treatment_sotorasib=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + treatment_sotorasib + kras_g12c + treatment_sotorasib:kras_g12c
analyses.result_summary: In the same interaction model, the `treatment_sotorasib` main coefficient, interpreted at `kras_g12c=0`, was -0.00068 months (p=0.911), not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The increase in adjusted mean `pfs_months` associated with `treatment_osimertinib=1` is larger among patients with `egfr_mutation=1` than among patients with `egfr_mutation=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + treatment_osimertinib + egfr_mutation + treatment_osimertinib:egfr_mutation
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_osimertinib:egfr_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.01664 months (p=0.472), not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The increase in adjusted mean `pfs_months` associated with `treatment_olaparib=1` is larger among patients with `brca2_mutation=1` than among patients with `brca2_mutation=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + treatment_olaparib + brca2_mutation + treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.00449 months (p=0.923), not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `brca2_mutation=1` have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `brca2_mutation=0`, independent of other biomarkers and baseline factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + egfr_mutation + kras_g12c + alk_fusion + stk11_mutation + brca2_mutation + tmb_high + pdl1_tps
analyses.result_summary: In the biomarker main-effects model, `brca2_mutation` had an adjusted coefficient of -0.11120 months (p=9.54e-9).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The increase in adjusted mean `pfs_months` associated with `treatment_pembrolizumab=1` is larger among patients with `pdl1_tps>=0.5` than among patients with `pdl1_tps<0.5`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + treatment_pembrolizumab + I(pdl1_tps>=0.5) + treatment_pembrolizumab:I(pdl1_tps>=0.5)
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_pembrolizumab:pdl1_tps>=0.5` interaction coefficient was +0.00485 months (p=0.781), not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: For each 1.0 increase in `pdl1_tps` on its 0-1 scale, adjusted mean `pfs_months` is higher, independent of other biomarkers and baseline factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + egfr_mutation + kras_g12c + alk_fusion + stk11_mutation + brca2_mutation + tmb_high + pdl1_tps
analyses.result_summary: In the biomarker main-effects model, continuous `pdl1_tps` had an adjusted coefficient of +0.01261 months per 1.0 increase (p=0.422), not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The increase in adjusted mean `pfs_months` associated with `treatment_pembrolizumab=1` is larger among patients with `tmb_high=1` than among patients with `tmb_high=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + treatment_pembrolizumab + tmb_high + treatment_pembrolizumab:tmb_high
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_pembrolizumab:tmb_high` interaction coefficient was -0.01378 months (p=0.384), not significant and opposite the hypothesized direction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The adjusted `treatment_pembrolizumab=1` association with `pfs_months` is lower among patients with `stk11_mutation=1` than among patients with `stk11_mutation=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + smoking_current + smoking_former + ecog_ps + histology_squamous + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + pleural_effusion + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + treatment_pembrolizumab + stk11_mutation + treatment_pembrolizumab:stk11_mutation
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_pembrolizumab:stk11_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.01307 months (p=0.515), not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stk11_mutation=1` have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `stk11_mutation=0`, independent of other biomarkers and baseline factors.
Patients with `alk_fusion=1` have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `alk_fusion=0`, independent of other biomarkers and baseline factors.
Patients with `egfr_mutation=1` have higher adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `egfr_mutation=0`, independent of other biomarkers and baseline factors.
Patients with `tmb_high=1` have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `tmb_high=0`, independent of other biomarkers and baseline factors.
